title: Visited Dr. Pradeep Haranahalli (Cardiologist)
text: **** ***** *** ***** *********** ** *** **** *** **** ********* *** ********* ** *********** *** **** *** *** ** *********** ******* He knows when a patient needs reassurance, when a family needs guidance, and when urgent attention is required. Even though he handles extremely critical and busy cases, he still manages to be approachable and available whenever genuinely needed.
